overrideJustification: VAL-NIX-005, VAL-NIX-006, VAL-NIX-008 require a live deployment on Node B to test (systemd units, Caddy routes, restart behavior). These assertions have been moved from nixos-config.fulfills (foundation) to ci-deploy-pipeline.fulfills (deploy milestone) where they will be validated after actual deployment. 17/20 foundation assertions passed; the 3 deferred are pending in validation-state.json.

failedAssertions.reason: Node B is not running the go-choir NixOS deployment, so the expected go-choir-auth/proxy/vmctl/gateway systemd unit files are absent.
draft.choir-ip.com returned HTTP 502 for the expected routes because active Caddy configuration still proxies traffic to 127.0.0.1:9090 instead of the go-choir backends.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No live go-choir services are installed on Node B, so restart-on-failure behavior could not be exercised safely.

appliedUpdates.description: Added flow-validator isolation guidance for shell/curl validation plus notes about using temporary built binaries for signal tests and validating x86_64-linux Nix packages on Node B from macOS.
